PKC 2026

May 25-28, 2026

West Palm Beach, USA

PKC 2026 will take place in West Palm Beach, Florida, USA on May 25-28, 2026. PKC 2026 is organized by the International Association for Cryptologic Research (IACR).

Register now

Important dates

Oct 24, 2025

Submission deadline

Dec 16, 2025

First round notification

Dec 23, 2025

Rebuttal deadline

Feb 13, 2026

Final notification

Mar 6, 2026

Final versions due

May 25, 2026

Conference begins

Website updates

11 May 2026

Please note that registration closes 22 May 2026

11 Apr 2026

Registration is open and the technical program for the conference is now online.

11 Mar 2026

Information about travel to the conference venue and nearby hotels is now available. The list of accepted papers has been added as well.

19 Sep 2025

Reminder: paper submissions are due in about a month

Jul 10, 2025

Website launched
